name: Otani Kogyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: Otani Kogyo Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells overhead wire hardware for power distribution/communication lines and CATVs in Japan. The company also designs, manufactures, and sells hardware for radio disaster prevention; screws; and power transmission towers/wireless towers, outdoor ironworks, mounts, racks, and fences. In Addition, it produces, sells, and constructs studs; and offers hot dip galvanizing services. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
